deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42K-$62K. Close May 1, 2026.
deals.next: Chris to pull MLS comps and RPR report, feed to Sirhc for analysis sheet

logs.m: Deal received via homesteadvested.com link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land acreage development opportunity. Listing canceled. Signs picked up. Sisters ended listing after March. Isaac development interest ($150K contingent) did not move forward.

logs.m: Listing canceled and signs retrieved. No path forward with sisters or Isaac development concept.
Isaac development discussion held. Sisters enthusiastic about mobile home concept for veterans and profit.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Vacant 6 months, double-carrying costs. Underwater ~$93K-$143K. Sellers moving back in to make updates before relisting. Termination release executed.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Matt and Chandler moving back in to make updates and repairs. Plan to relist when timing is right.
Honest conversation held. Chandler was laid off. Short sale path discussed as best option. Relationship intact.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell
deals.notes: Out of Corpus deal. Still searching. Rental duplex being sold, rents going up. Pivoting to new construction, no HOA. 301 W Saxet wholesale too heavy - out of deal.
deals.next: Revisit new construction search with builders. Confirm pre-approval with Zach.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching.
Isaac brought wholesale deal at 301 W Saxet, Corpus at $85K. Mike and Isaac scheduled phone call. Connected with Zach for 203k evaluation.

deals.title: Colton & Abby Brown
deals.notes: Divorce situation. 3BR/2BA, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K. Recommended list price $295K. Net proceeds ~$14.7K at that price.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Confirm acreage. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule photos.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. CMA pulled - thin market, 3 comps in 10 miles.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1886 sqft. Listed $259,900. Sellers relocating to NC second week of June. Multiple showings, second-look buyers are hottest. Potential foundation hairline crack flagged.
deals.next: Confirm second-look buyers showing time tomorrow. Monitor for backup offers.

logs.m: Showings going well. Second-look buyers came back - home is their favorite. Pre-inspection report offered.
Texted Jose and Katy about investor cash offer at $176,300. Fourth showing scheduled May 23.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank foreclosure. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Water meter pending. HouzzPro doing remodel at $54,877.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD for utility status. Replace camera batteries. Get listing agreement to Jerry and Ray.

logs.m: Visited property. Installed 3 cameras. Electricians reconnected everything. Drywall complete. Flooring starts tomorrow.
Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Need to update Kelly, Jerry, and Ray with progress.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Contract at $113,000 with Espinoza buyers. Waiting on EMD and signed TXR 1903 amendment from buyer agent Javier. Alyssa Castillo, Chicago Title, escrow officer.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier.

logs.m: New buyers Espinoza with buyer agent Javier. TXR 1903 amendment sent. EMD not yet received.
Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked: Conex contents, camper, feeders.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale cash transaction $152,000. Lien resolved Apr 21. Cleared and funded Apr 26. Officially closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Confirm commission received. Deliver gift basket. Thank Chelsey Bongiovi.

logs.m: Transaction officially confirmed closed and funded.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo. Release delivered to Chicago Title.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Rental listing. Jimbo backed out of arrangement. Release signed. Payment of $500 received. Ended professionally on good terms.

logs.m: Release sent with acknowledgment of payment received. Relationship intact.
Jimbo backed out of rental listing arrangement. Chris sent $500 to cover time and money invested.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden group. Grief to healing story with plants. Needs permission for content collaboration.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story on social media.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Met in person. Investor interested in Schertz area. Full intake still needed. Buy box unknown.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call. Understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Son inherited home behind Miss Pat. Deceased was avid gardener. Son has not been contacted yet. Sensitive situation.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat. Reach out to son with empathy angle.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife - VA Buyer
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Currently renting. Looking to purchase San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Confirm wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA lender.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner - Fixer Buyer
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome for full details on buyer and property needs.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Brandon helped start in real estate. Two opportunities: Green Bliss rental (uncle Jimbo) and mom Milagros new construction buyer.
leads.next: Confirm Green Bliss rental details. Register as Milagros buyer agent at builder visit.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon mom. Buyer rep signed May 7. Budget $50K down, target $1000 month payment. Not locked to any builder. Multiple builder rate buydowns in play.
leads.next: Pull new construction inventory options. Confirm pre-approval status. Set builder visit.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Nextdoor connection from High Country. Military retirement income plus two daughters disability income. Paying $1700 month rent. Motivated. Between jobs. Fixing credit proactively.
leads.next: Call today. Connect with VA lender. Qualify timeline and budget.

leads.title: Kurt Lehr
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Watching nearby listing under contract at $275K. Wants intel on offers received.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Determine if seller, buyer, or investor.

leads.title: Priority Bank Referral Pipeline
leads.detail: Bank relationship for REO listings. Active deal 181 CR 7751 Devine. Manny Fonseca Houston deal pending. Tennessee deal in progress.
leads.next: Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham for 181 CR 7751.

priorities.notes: Electric reconnected but new meter install pending. Water meter needs setup call back. Priority for listing readiness.

Monitor for backup offer from other agent

Get listing agreement signed and schedule professional photos

Pull new construction inventory matching budget and rate scenarios
